worker.desc: a sturdy honeybee carrying a tiny bucket beside the honeycomb
worker.palette: warm amber, honey gold, soft brown

forager.desc: a cheerful bee hugging an overflowing pollen basket in a wildflower meadow
forager.palette: meadow green, pollen yellow, sky blue

gleaner.desc: a tidy little bee sweeping up stray pollen grains

clover.desc: a happy bee perched on a four-leaf clover

dewdrop.desc: a tiny bee sipping a sparkling dewdrop on a misty leaf
dewdrop.palette: soft mint, dewy silver, pale gold

sprig.desc: a sprightly young bee bouncing on a fresh green sprig

pollen.desc: a fuzzy bee completely dusted in golden pollen

blossom.desc: a gentle bee nestled in the first pink blossom of spring

scout.desc: an adventurous bee with a tiny explorer cap scanning the horizon
scout.palette: sky blue, leaf green, warm tan

nurse.desc: a kindly bee with a small nurse cap tending honeycomb cells
nurse.palette: soft white, gentle pink, honey gold

dancer.desc: a lively bee mid waggle-dance with playful motion swirls
dancer.palette: vivid orange, sunflower yellow, warm brown

gardener.desc: a bee with a tiny watering can in a blooming garden

thistle.desc: a hardy bee resting on a purple thistle bloom

lavender.desc: a serene bee drifting over a lavender field
lavender.palette: lavender purple, sage green, soft gold

sunflower.desc: a sunny bee atop a giant sunflower facing the sun
sunflower.palette: sunflower yellow, leaf green, sky blue

bramble.desc: a clever bee tucked in a tangled bramble hedge with berries
bramble.palette: bramble green, berry red, dusky purple

drone.desc: a plump relaxed bee lounging on a cushion of honeycomb
drone.palette: rich amber, deep gold, cozy brown

sentinel.desc: a watchful bee in tiny armor guarding the hive entrance
sentinel.palette: burnished bronze, steel grey, honey gold

amber.desc: a radiant bee with translucent amber wings glowing in sunlight
amber.palette: glowing amber, honey orange, warm gold

nectarine.desc: a sweet bee sipping from a ripe nectarine in an orchard
nectarine.palette: nectarine orange, blush pink, leaf green

honeydew.desc: a glistening bee coated in shimmering honeydew
honeydew.palette: dewy gold, pale green, glassy white

dusk.desc: a calm bee foraging under a twilight sky with fireflies
dusk.palette: twilight indigo, dusky purple, firefly gold

marigold.desc: a vivid bee blazing atop a bright marigold
marigold.palette: marigold orange, deep yellow, ember red

regent.desc: a noble bee wearing a small golden circlet on a throne of comb
regent.palette: royal gold, deep amber, regal crimson

warden.desc: a steadfast bee in a watchkeeper cloak holding a lantern at dawn
warden.palette: dawn gold, slate blue, warm bronze

artisan.desc: a masterful bee sculpting a flawless honeycomb with tiny tools
artisan.palette: honey gold, warm copper, soft cream

luminary.desc: a glowing legendary bee trailing soft light over a vast meadow
luminary.palette: luminous gold, soft white, meadow green

monarch.desc: a majestic crowned bee with grand shimmering wings on a flowering throne
monarch.palette: imperial gold, royal purple, deep amber

empress.desc: a beloved empress bee radiant amid a complete thriving hive

solstice.desc: an ancient golden bee haloed by the midsummer sun
solstice.palette: blazing gold, sunrise orange, warm white

leaguechampion.desc: a triumphant champion bee wearing a golden crown and holding a tiny trophy, confetti drifting around
leaguechampion.palette: champion gold, royal purple, trophy silver
